stemHtml: What is the role of the pulmonary artery compared to the systemic circulatory system?

options.a: The pulmonary artery carries oxygenated blood from the lungs to the heart, while systemic circulation carries oxygenated blood from the heart to the brain.
options.b: The pulmonary artery carries unoxygenated blood from the lungs to the body, while systemic circulation carries oxygenated blood from the heart to the lungs.
options.c: The pulmonary artery carries oxygenated blood from the heart to the lungs, while systemic circulation carries unoxygenated blood to the body.
options.d: The pulmonary artery carries unoxygenated blood to the lungs, while the systemic circulation carries oxygenated blood to the rest of the body.
